use_cases: Displaying success confirmations after form submissions or completed actions
Showing error states with corrective action links for failed operations
Communicating informational status updates to users with optional CTAs
Indicating system health or monitoring status in dashboards
Alerting users to important notifications with navigation to details
ai_summary: A lightweight status notification badge component supporting error, success, and info variants with optional icons and action links. Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for variant management, this component serves as a general-purpose feedback element for communicating system status, alerts, and calls-to-action across various application contexts.
